title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 30
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two students arranging a language club meeting.
items.audio_script: Man: Are we still meeting in the library for the language club today? I wrote it down yesterday, but I have not checked today's message. || Woman: That was the original plan, but the library is closed for an event this afternoon. [1]We are meeting in the café area instead[/1].. || Man: Good thing I asked. I nearly went to the old place and waited there. What about the sports hall? || Woman: No, nobody will be waiting there. I will arrive a few minutes early and message you if anything changes again before we start.
items.question: Where will the club meet?
items.explanation: The club will meet in the café area.

items.context: You hear two friends preparing for a bicycle ride.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you packed for the bicycle ride tomorrow yet? I put a picnic blanket in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Boy: That was mentioned earlier, but the organiser will not allow anyone to ride without one. [2]Everyone has to bring a helmet[/2].. || Girl: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a map as well? || Boy: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What must the speaker take?
items.explanation: The speaker must take a helmet.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the weekend.
items.audio_script: Boy: Are we still going to go sailing this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Girl: That was our first plan, but the lake is closed because of wind and the market is cancelled. We also thought about whether to visit an outdoor market. || Boy: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Girl: [3]We are going to a board-game café instead[/3].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Boy: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They decide to go to a board-game café.

items.context: You hear two people discussing an English class.
items.audio_script: Woman: I need to check the time for the English class. I wrote down ten o'clock, but I am not sure it is correct. || Man: It changed this morning because the teacher has a meeting before the lesson. [4]The class starts at half past ten today[/4]., and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Woman: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time and waited there. || Man: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there may not be time to go home first.
items.question: What time does the class start?
items.explanation: The class starts at half past ten.

items.context: You hear two students talking about a printer.
items.audio_script: Man: How are you getting on with the printer? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Woman: I first thought there was no paper left, and my brother wondered whether the ink had finished. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [5]There is a sheet of paper stuck inside it[/5].. || Man: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it to print my project before school. || Woman: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What is wrong with the printer?
items.explanation: A sheet of paper is stuck inside the printer.

items.context: You hear two friends travelling to the theatre.
items.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting to the theatre tonight? I thought you were planning to travel by underground. || Boy: I was, but the underground station is closed and parking near the theatre is costly. I also considered going by car. [6]We will go by bus instead[/6].. || Girl: That sounds sensible. What time do you expect to arrive there? || Boy: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the journey online, so I will message you when I leave home. || Girl: Good. I will wait near the entrance so you can find me easily.
items.question: How will they get to the theatre?

items.context: You hear two friends choosing something to eat.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you chosen what to order? The queue is moving quickly, and we need to leave soon. || Girl: I nearly chose a chocolate cake, and I also looked at an ice cream, but I had ice cream yesterday and the cake looks too rich. || Boy: So what are you going to have? I need to choose mine before we reach the counter. || Girl: [7]I will have a bowl of fruit[/7].. It should be enough for me, and then we can find somewhere quiet to sit before we go.
items.question: What will the speaker have?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses a bowl of fruit.
